title: Furniture Placement
description: LLM-generated furniture layout for a quantized floor plan. Coordinates are in grid pixels (unitless); multiply by m_per_px to convert to meters.

plan.description: Name of the source floor plan (matches the plan CSS filename stem)

gen.description: Generation ID: YYYYMMDD-<4 hex>-<model tag>. Tag reflects the arrange model

m_per_px.description: Meters per grid pixel — matches the plan CSS header scale

curate_model.description: Model used for curation stage (e.g. sonnet, opus)

arrange_model.description: Model used for arrangement stage (e.g. haiku, sonnet)

curate_vibe.description: Style brief passed to curation, if any

item_no.description: Product item number (matches catalog and footprint snippet IDs)

room.description: Target room ID from the floor plan

x.description: Horizontal center of placed item (grid pixels, from left)

y.description: Vertical center of placed item (grid pixels, from top)

r.description: Rotation in degrees clockwise. 0 = footprint as-is, 90 = rotated 90 degrees clockwise (width and height swap)
